The '''''Saryabo IV'' Pinnace Scoutcraft''' was developed near the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a way to transport elite troops to and from key target areas. At the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] only a dozen of these ships were still in existence. To achieve its main objective, the ship was fitted with a top-notch [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] system and [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]]. It was also given minor offensive and defensive components to ensure that the troops reached their destination alive.
